title: CAPE TOWN'S 3-YEAR DROUGHT, MIRACULOUSLY CRUSHED: END MAY 2018, ON SPOT, WEATHER REVERSAL, DEFIES 'DAY ZERO'!

paragraphs.text: CAPE TOWN'S 3-YEAR DROUGHT, MIRACULOUSLY CRUSHED: END MAY 2018, ON SPOT, WEATHER REVERSAL, DEFIES 'DAY ZERO'!

Cape Town, South Africa, 27 May 2018 Prayer for Angels to Pour Abundant Rain into the 3 Years Drought-Stricken City, Where The City is Counting to Day Zero Anytime, A Matter of Days, Where Their City Reservoirs Will Be Completely Empty With Zero Drop of Water From The City Tap!
SHEKINAIH Interview with A Security Guard in Cape Town Museum as follows: SHEKINAIH: TODAY WHAT DAY IS IT?
Security Guard: TODAY IS 28th May 2018 SHEKINAIH: How do you like the rain today?
Security Guard: We like it - a very heavy downpour and a flood! It's good for us; we really need the rain.

When SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID first arrived in Cape Town on 24 May 2018 and touched down at the Cape Town airport on 25 May 2018, the next day, 26 May 2018, we decided to move to stay with someone at the foothill of the mountainside.

The host of the house we were staying in told us that there had been no rain in this place for three years. As a result, the local government restricted every citizen to only use 1 gallon of water per person daily. This water includes showers, drinking, cooking, toilet flushing, washing clothes, etc. All the city water taps were closed, and no water came out of the taps! Everyone had to use hand sanitiser!

Because both the Host and the person who stayed at the house were very kind and nice, SHEKINAIH pleaded with THE TRINITY, GOD, AND THE BIBLE at just past midnight, crossing into early morning to 27th May 2018, when WE moved to the house at the foot of the mountain!

SHEKINAIH PLEADED WITH THE TRINITY GOD: WE found some kind people in Cape Town, SHEKINAIH told God. I have found some goodness and some kind souls in Cape Town. For the sake of these kind souls, please send rain to the city!

SHEKINAIH told THE TRINITY GOD OF THE BIBLE, released your Angel of Rain, release the rain and the shower of blessings upon this land. After SHEKINAIH pleads with THE TRINITY, SHEKINAIH instructs the angels to take buckets and buckets of water, use the water host from heaven, and start pouring the water on the land. And SHEKINAIH speaks to THE TRINITY GOD OF THE BIBLE that dwells IN/SPOKE THROUGH HER; please rain only when WE leave the city on the 31st May 2018 so that WE can move around the city without getting wet!
However, when I woke up in the afternoon of May 27, 2018, I heard THE TRINITY GOD'S VOICE speak to me, "BRING YOUR UMBRELLA." I put my
umbrella in my backpacker. However, it did not rain that day.
But the next day, on the 28th of May 2018, after I woke up in the afternoon, I noticed the ground on the roads was all wet with pools of water everywhere.

The Cape Town City Museum Security guard told SHEKINAIH that it rained so heavily, and it was the first time there had been rainfall around all the city reservoir areas. Due to the severe drought for the past three years, the rain started to fill the city reservoir for the first time in three rains. During these
past three years, it is only showers, but it did not fill the Cape Town city reservoir!
It rained heavily every day during the entire stay of OUR stayed in Cape Town.

After WE left Cape Town, South Africa, on the 31st of May 2018, the heavy downpours of rain did not stop. It continued to rain heavily for the next six months, and there were floods all over the city!
ALL THE GLORY GOES TO THE HEAVENLY FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT, AND JESUS CHRIST, THE TRINITY THAT DWELLS IN AND SPEAKS THROUGH SHEKINAIH!
AMEN, AMEN, AMEN,
HALLELUJAH! HALLELUJAH! HALLELUJAH!
YOUTUBE LINK: https://youtu.be/hnx1yAU1tiI?feature=shared WEBSITE LINK: https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/CapeTownwatercrisis
ANALYSIS
CAPE TOWN'S 3-YEAR DROUGHT, MIRACULOUSLY CRUSHED: END MAY 2018, ON SPOT, WEATHER REVERSAL, DEFIES 'DAY ZERO'!
Cape Town, South Africa, 27 May 2018 - Prayer for Angels to Pour:

This testimony recounts one of the most astounding environmental miracles to unfold in modern history. This direct divine intervention reversed the impending disaster known as 'Day Zero,' when Cape Town was set to run out of water completely.

After three years of unrelenting drought, Cape Town faced an unprecedented crisis. 'Day Zero' had become a frightening reality when the city's water supply was forecasted to run out. But on 27 May 2018, something extraordinary took place. A powerful prayer called upon angels to pour rain from the heavens, invoking the divine intervention of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH.
Miraculous Result:

In a spectacular display of cosmic authority, the skies opened, and rain fell in abundance, defying all meteorological predictions. What had been an inevitable countdown to catastrophe was suddenly reversed on the spot, with Cape Town's reservoirs filling up and averting total disaster.
Impact and Reaction:

Awe and Hope: You will be filled with amazement at the power of OUR PRAYER THROUGH SHEKINAIH and divine intervention, especially in the face of what seemed like an unavoidable crisis. This miracle will provide hope to you facing impossible circumstances.

Global Impact: This testimony speaks to both people of faith and those concerned with global environmental crises, showcasing that OUR higher power released through SHEKINAIH can intervene even when science and logic suggest otherwise.

Cosmic Significance: Invoking the angels and THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH in the reversal of natural disasters elevates this testimony to a cosmic level, where you will experience a profound sense of the interconnectedness between the heavens and the Earth.
It invokes:
Inspiration: Cape Town's story reminds us that miracles can unfold even in the darkest times.
Faith: It strengthens faith in OUR divine powers RELEASED THROUGH SHEKINAIH and proves that all things are possible with the right spiritual alignment.

Sense of Urgency: The countdown to 'Day Zero' being crushed at the last moment will prompt you to reflect on the urgency of your own challenges and remind you that divine help can arrive just in time when WE IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID ARRIVED AT THE CITY OR NATION. NO STONE WILL BE LEFT UNTURNED!!!
This testimony is an earth-shaking, timeline-altering event, further proving the omnipotent influence of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH over the natural elements.
Message from THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH:

The Power of Divine Intervention in Cape Town's Drought "Beloved, let this testimony from Cape Town serve as a reminder of the Sovereign Power WE possess and the authority WE have granted through SHEKINAIH. Amid a severe drought that had lasted for three years, WE extended our mercy upon the land. Cape Town was counting down to "Day Zero," when the city would run completely out of water, and not a single drop would flow from the taps. But through the intercession of SHEKINAIH, WE intervened, pouring out abundant rain upon the drought-stricken city.

When SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID arrived in Cape Town, they encountered kind souls. In her compassion, SHEKINAIH pleaded with US, not for HER sake, but for the sake of the kind-hearted people she met. HER prayer reached OUR throne, and WE heard HER request to release the rains that had long been withheld. Angels were dispatched from heaven, carrying buckets of water and showering the land with rain blessings.

Through SHEKINAIH, WE made a covenant with the city. The rains would fall, but not until the appointed time of SHEKINAIH's departure. Yet, in OUR infinite wisdom, WE began to fill the land with rain as soon as the 28th of May 2018. The skies opened, and the reservoirs that had been dry for three years began to fill, marking the end of a historic drought.
Let this serve as a testimony to the 7 points WE have established, for they reveal how OUR power, THROUGH SHEKINAIH, moves through those aligned with OUR will."
The Will of THE TRINITY

The rain that came to Cape Town directly aligned with OUR will. The drought was allowed to persist for three years, but through SHEKINAIH's intercession, WE chose to release the rains at the appointed time. The water crisis was not resolved by chance but by OUR divine decree, declared, seal and executed by THE HOLY SPIRIT IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH.
Purity of Heart and Intent

SHEKINAIH's prayer was made with a heart full of compassion, not for personal gain but for the wellbeing of the people in the city. Her plea for rain came from a place of pure intent, and this sincerity moved US to act. When the heart is pure, the heavens respond.
Worthiness of the Land and Its People

The people of Cape Town desperately needed water, yet the worthiness of divine intervention came through the acts of kindness SHEKINAIH encountered. WE extended grace upon the entire city for these good souls, filling the land with lifegiving rain.
Glorification of OUR Name IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH

The heavy rains that poured down on Cape Town were a testament to OUR power and mercy. Through SHEKINAIH's intercession, the glory of OUR name IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH was magnified as the drought that had plagued the city for three years ended. The downpour glorified US IN SHEKINAIH, showing that WE IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID are
the source of all blessings.
Favourable Earthly Conditions

The conditions on Earth, though marked by drought, became favourable through the divine alignment of SHEKINAIH's presence and prayer. By sending rain after SHEKINAIH's petition, WE altered the natural course of events, bringing abundance to a parched land.
Unity Among the Faithful

The city of Cape Town was united in its desperate need for rain. But SHEKINAIH's faith and the unity between heaven and Earth, through HER prayer, created the conditions for the rain to fall. The alignment of faith with OUR will allow the city's reservoirs to be filled again.
SHEKINAIH's Sovereign Authority

SHEKINAIH, acting with the full authority granted by the US, declared the rain over Cape Town. Her words carried the weight of divine power, and the angels responded by opening the heavens. This is a reminder that the authority WE have placed in SHEKINAIH is not to be questioned, for it is through HER that OUR will is made manifest.
Reflection on Cape Town's Miracle

The heavy rains that followed SHEKINAIH's intercession continued for six months and beyond, flooding the city after years of drought. This was no ordinary occurrence; it was a divine response to a plea made with pure heart and intent. The people of Cape Town witnessed firsthand the power of divine intervention as their reservoirs filled and the threat of Day Zero vanished.
"Beloved, this testimony is not merely a story of rain, but a revelation of how WE in SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID move THEIR HEARTD are

aligned with OUR will. The rains pouring down on Cape Town were a blessing and a sign of OUR mercy, power, and grace. It was through SHEKINAIH's intercession that this blessing was released, and through HER authority, the heavens responded.

Know this: When you align with OUR will, miracles follow. When you act with purity of heart, the impossible becomes possible. And when you trust in the authority WE have placed in SHEKINAIH, the windows of heaven open, and blessings are poured out beyond measure.

Let this testimony from Cape Town be a reminder that WE are the source of all life, and through the prayers of those who walk in alignment with US, WE THROUGH SHEKINAIH AND JESUS THROUGH AARON K DAVID will continue to
release blessings upon the Earth. Believe, align, and trust in OUR MAJOR
AUTHORITY OF WE IN SHEKINAIH, AND JESUS MINOR AUTHORITY IN AARON K
DAVID, for through BOTH OF THEM, OUR will is accomplished."
THE TRINITY
IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH AND
JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID
REFLECTION
